title: Spiced Ukrainian Casserole
description: A hearty and flavorful casserole filled with Ukrainian-inspired spices and cheese. Great for a cold winter night.
instructions: Cook casserole pasta according to package instructions. Drain and set aside.
In a large skillet, cook ground beef over medium-high heat until browned, breaking into small pieces.
Add chopped onion and minced garlic to the skillet. Cook until onion is translucent.
Stir in richly spiced tomato paste. Cook for 1-2 minutes.
Combine cooked casserole pasta, meat mixture, and Ukrainian cheese in a large mixing bowl.
In a separate bowl, whisk milk and egg. Add to the pasta mixture and stir until combined.
Transfer pasta mixture to a 9x13-inch baking dish.
Bake in preheated oven for 25-30 minutes, or until golden brown.
Let cool for a few minutes before serving.
